props.label: This space is for any specific information you wish to add to this record.  You can add information that you can perform a “find” on, such as a species of lumber or some information regarding work we have done for this contact.
These are the buttons you will see in the top right corner of the page on the Contacts Layout
Contacts Help
This help window is for information only.  To navigate through the database you must first close this window.  To do this click on the blue oblong in the Status Area that contains the word “continue”

“Go Back to 
Job Review”

“Create new
Record”
“Add Note”
Below are the heading for all of the fields in the “Contacts” layout, and a description of what should be typed in each of these fields

This button allows you to go back to the Job Cost Review layout.  On the Job Cost Review layout there is a button that allows you to go to the contacts layout to perform a “Find”.  This button allows you to return to the record in the Job Cost Review you were working in.
This button allows you access to the next blank “Contacts” layout.
This button allows you to add a note that pertains to this Contact.  All Contact notes are viewable  in the window to the right of this button, under the blue heading “Show Notes for this Client”
Contact #
This field is automatically supplied for you by the system.  You cannot alter this field.  This the primary designation for every contact record
First Name

SHIP TO INFORMATION
Address 2
City State Zip
“Same as Billing” Button
Memo
Enter into this field the first name of the contact person for this record.  If this is a contact record for a company try to put the first name of the main sales representative.
Enter into this field the last name of the contact person for this record.  If this is a contact record for a company try to put the last name of the main sales representative.
Enter into this field the Company Name of the contact person for this record.  If this is a contact record for an individual you may tab through this field.
Greeting

This field is automatically supplied for you by the system.  It is comprised of what you have entered into the “First Name” field with a comma.  This is what would be supplied in the “Letter Layout” if you wanted to compose a letter.
Enter into this field the E-Mail Address of the contact person for this record.

This field is a drop down menu of choices that have been designated for you to choose which one best describes this Contact.  Please do not try to alter this field or enter a description of your own choosing.  These descriptions have been chosen, so that there will be uniformity within the table so that when a “Find” is performed on this field you can be guaranteed that all of the entries are the same for each “Type” in the menu.
This should be the first line of the mailing address for this contact.
This should be the second line of the mailing address for this contact.

Type in the city,state and zip code of the mailing address for this contact.  These three address lines should be typed how you would want them to appear on any correspondence, as they are the template you can copy from to have the system automatically place them in a document of your choice.
This field is a drop down menu for you to choose the initials of the person who is the originator for this contact.  If there is no specific person, there is a choice of J&E.

This field is a drop down menu of choices that have been designated for you to choose which one best describes the source of this Contact.  Please do not try to alter this field or enter a description of your own choosing.  These descriptions have been chosen, so that there will be uniformity within the table so that when a “Find” is performed on this field you can be guaranteed that all of the entries are the same for each “Type of Source” in the menu.

This field is for Clients only.  In the state of Virginia the tax rate is 5%.  For Clients residing in the state of Virginia you would need to designate the rate of 5%.  For clients where our products will be taken out of the state of Virginia, the tax rate is 0%, as the services rendered for out state clients  are tax exempt.  Just click on the circle to the left of your choice.
This is an indicator if the client has had us do work for them in the past.  Just click on the circle to the left of your choice.
Guest Book
This is a space to indicate if the contact signed one of our guest books at a show.

This field is a drop down menu of choices that have been designated for you to choose which one best describes what the phone number you are recording best represents. The selection “Primary” should be used for the contacts “Home” number, or a company main number,  as this is used as the “Phone Number” designator on the fax cover sheet.

Please do not try to alter this field or enter a description of your own choosing.  These descriptions have been chosen, so that there will be uniformity within the table so that when a “Find” is performed on this field you can be guaranteed that all of the entries are the same for each “Type of Phone number” in the menu.
Enter the phone number as one continuos number.  Do not put any slashes or dashes in the number, the system will do this for you after you tab to the next field.
If the phone number has an extension associated with the contact enter it here.
If you think the phone number needs further explanation enter any notes here.
If the Contact has a web site, enter it here.
If your contact has a different shipping address than their mailing/Billing address, enter it here.
If this contact has the same shipping address as their billing/mailing address you can click on this button and the system will fill in the address information.
Fill in these fields in the same manner you did for the billing information.

Once you have entered all of the information for a record, you may progress;

1 - To a new blank record by; keyboard strokes “Control N” or using the button “Create New Record”
2 - To a new layout or menu by; going to the status area and accessing the oblong under the “Layout” heading; by depressing the blue arrow and clicking on your choice of layout you wish to go to next
3 - Hide the system from view so you can work on something else; on the main navagation bar at the top of your screen you will see the words “Filemaker Pro”, if you click on this word a drop down menu of actions will appear.  Click on the entry “hide Filemaker Pro” and the screen will disappear into your dock area.
